justification: The diff successfully migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but it sets java.version to 17 instead of 21 and retains WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (a deprecated pattern) with only a comment hinting at manual migration. The use of text blocks in ReservationRepository.java is a nice Java 15+ touch, but the incomplete security migration and incorrect target Java version prevent a higher score.
